title: helichrysum microcephalum
intro: Helichrysum microcephalum, also known as the small-headed helichrysum, is a flowering plant in the daisy family that is native to South Africa. The medicinal properties of Helichrysum microcephalum lie in its essential oil, which has anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. The health benefits of this plant include reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and relieving symptoms of arthritis, as well as its ability to support digestive health and reduce stress. Helichrysum microcephalum can be prepared as an essential oil, tincture, or infused in tea, and is often used in aromatherapy to promote relaxation and reduce anxiety.
